notes: Accepted container-image risk entries. Re-reviewed 2026-06-17. Most prior base-layer CVEs were remediated by applying OS security updates in the Dockerfiles (backend: apt-get upgrade; frontend: apk upgrade) and by gating grype on fixable findings only (--only-fixed). The remaining entries are upstream CPython advisories whose fixes ship only in Python 3.13+/3.15, which are not available in the 3.12 image stream this service runs on. Follow-up: evaluate a Python 3.13 base image bump to retire these. Keep this list minimal and remove entries once fixes reach the 3.12 stream.

accepted.reason: Upstream CPython advisory fixed only in Python 3.13.13/3.14.4/3.15.0a8; no fix available in the 3.12 stream used by the pinned base image.
